title: Bouquet Thai Crunch
description: A light and chewy Thai dish infused with the flavors of the classic bouquet garni, perfect for a snack or dessert, tailored to be low FODMAP.

ingredients.name: 1 cup tapioca pearls
ingredients.notes: Soaked in water for at least 4 hours or overnight

ingredients.name: 2 teaspoons dried Thai basil (leaves only)
ingredients.notes: For its characteristic aroma and flavor

ingredients.name: 1 teaspoon fish sauce
ingredients.notes: Use to taste, as it is strongly flavored

instructions: Soak the tapioca pearls in water for at least 4 hours or overnight. Rinse them thoroughly to remove any grit.
Combine the soaked tapioca pearls, coconut cream (if using), Thai basil leaves, fish sauce, sugar, and grated lime zest in a pot over medium heat.
Stir until the mixture thickens, about 10-15 minutes. Do not let it boil as this can cause the pearls to break up.
Once the mixture has reached your desired consistency, remove from heat and mix in crushed roasted peanuts.
Let the dish cool before serving. Serve chilled or at room temperature.
Store leftovers in an airtight container for up to 2 days.
